payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Right-edge crop of a dark brown wooden wall-mounted picture frame with a narrow-to-medium molded profile and a thin gold inner trim, holding a sailboat print; frame corner is visible and slightly worn, partially cut off by the image edge. Approximate camera distance ~1.0 m.
